title: Dataset
text:
Dataset
Vamos a usar el dataset vega_datasets:

import altair as alt
from vega_datasets import data

Vamos a usar cars:

cars = data.cars()
cars.head()

Visulización Scatterplot
Vamos a hacer un scatterplot de Horsepower vs Miles_per_Gallon:

alt.Chart(cars).mark_point().encode(
    x='Horsepower',
    y='Miles_per_Gallon',
    color='Origin'
)
